---
title: "Upcoming Events"
format: html
---

## Upcoming Events

::: {=html}
<div class="events-list">

  <div class="event-card">
    <div class="event-date">03 April 2026</div>
    <h3>Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University</p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card">
    <div class="event-date">10 April 2026</div>
    <h3>Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University</p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card">
    <div class="event-date">16 April 2026</div>
    <h3>TÜBİTAK Science Talks: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Ankara Lisesi, Ankara</p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card">
    <div class="event-date">17 April 2026</div>
    <h3>Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University</p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card">
    <div class="event-date">24 April 2026</div>
    <h3>Hacettepe University Social Entrepreneurship Training of Trainers Program</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Seminar Hall, Department of Sociology, Beytepe Campus, Hacettepe University</p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card">
    <div class="event-date">29 April 2026</div>
    <h3>TÜBİTAK Science Talks: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Yayla Mesleki ve Teknik Anadolu Lisesi, Zonguldak</p>
  </div>

  <div class="event-card">
    <div class="event-date">30 April 2026</div>
    <h3>TÜBİTAK Science Talks: Social Entrepreneurship – The Art of Changing the World</h3>
    <p><strong>Location:</strong> Gerede Hacı Sadık Öztosun Anadolu Lisesi, Bolu</p>
  </div>

</div>
:::
